calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Plaintiffs Request For Court Judgment Against Timothy Stewart
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Timothy Stewart, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Thomas W. Purtell, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Diana Bodish, John Spray, Emily Lahee and Edwin Spray, Successors-in-Interest to Terry "Rex" Spray, Deceased.
Plaintiffs were not present for this morning's proceedings.
No Appearance by respondent Timothy Stewart, an individual.
Plaintiffs' complaint for Wrongful Death-Survival Action and Negligence-Premise Liability, was filed on April 1, 2014.
Order granting plaintiffs' request to serve defendant Timothy Stewart via publication was filed on November 17, 2014.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Statement of Damages in the San Mateo Times was filed on December 3, 2015.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Timothy Stewart was filed on December 3, 2015.
Default as to defendant Timothy Stewart was entered on December 3, 2015.
Judgment in favor of defendant Normandie Apartments was enterd on November 1, 2016.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 12, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Diana Bodish, John Spray, Emily Lahee and Edwin Spray, Successors-in-Interest to Terry "Rex" Spray, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendant Timothy Stewart, as follows:

GENERAL DAMAGES:

(A) Pain, suffering and inconvience - $1,000,000,00.
(B) Emotional distress - $1,000,000.00.
(C) Loss of society and companionship - $10,000,000.00.
(wrongful death actions only)

Punitive Damages - $1,000,000.00.
Costs - $770.00.

Total - $13,000,770.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion For Plaintiffs Request For Court Judgment Against Timothy Stewart
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Continued To Apr-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Timothy Stewart, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Thomas W. Purtell, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Diana Bodish, John Spray, Emily Lahee and Edwin Spray, Successors-in-Interest to Terry "Rex" Spray.
Plaintiffs were not present for this morning's proceedings.
Sergeant John Kasper of the San Francisco Police Department's Homicide Division was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by respondent Timothy Stewart, an individual.
Plaintiffs' complaint for Wrongful Death-Survival Action; and Negligence-Premise Liability, was filed on April 1, 2014.
Order granting plaintiffs' request to serve defendant Timothy Stewart via publication was filed on November 17, 2014.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Statement of Damages in the San Mateo Times was filed on December 3, 2015.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Timothy Stewart was filed on December 3, 2015.
Default as to defendant Timothy Stewart was entered on December 3, 2015.
Judgment in favor of defendant Normandie Apartments was enterd on November 1, 2016.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 12, 2019.

Good cause appearing, the Court CONTINUES this matter to Thursday, April 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 in order for counsel to submit more detailed declarations from plaintiffs regarding not only the incident in question which led to the filing of the complaint, but also plaintiffs' relationship with the deceased, Terry "Rex" Spray.
